response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptionally skilled software engineer with strong craftsmanship principles and experience building large-scale systems, he lacks the critical Java/Kotlin and Spring ecosystem expertise required for this enterprise IDE role. His career has been focused on JavaScript/TypeScript web development, D programming, and full-stack work rather than JVM-based enterprise frameworks. Limited Java exposure (robotic arms, LabWindows components) and zero evidence of Spring, enterprise frameworks, or language tooling/IDE internals experience represent a fundamental mismatch with role requirements.
strengths: Demonstrates strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) consistently across multiple roles and diverse technology stacks
Proven track record building large-scale, high-performance systems handling millions of requests with complex distributed architectures and microservices
Exceptional learning ability and technical versatility, successfully mastering multiple languages and rapidly adopting unfamiliar domains (e.g., iOS/Apple TV development)
concerns: Critically lacks Java and Kotlin expertise—the role requires 'strong expertise in Java and Kotlin with deep JVM understanding,' but resume shows only peripheral Java mentions and zero Kotlin experience
No demonstrated experience with Spring ecosystem, enterprise frameworks (Spring Boot, Quarkus, Hibernate), build tools (Maven, Gradle), or application server integration—all core to the role

Career trajectory focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, web platforms, and distributed systems rather than JVM development, IDE internals, language tooling, or developer-experience optimization in enterprise tools

key_factors.factor: Spring ecosystem and enterprise framework experience
